subject: Axew, small bipedal dragon-type creature with prominent lateral tusks/horns on its jaw, standing in a rocky environment with berry bushes
description: A small, compact dragon-type creature stands in a rocky outdoor setting. The figure has a pale green body, a rounded head, and two large curved tusks protruding from the sides of its lower jaw. Its eyes are small and alert. The background shows reddish-brown rocky formations and what appear to be small berry bushes or shrubs. The lighting is even and natural, giving a daylight outdoor feel. The creature faces roughly forward with a neutral, alert posture.
foreground: small bipedal dragon creature with lateral jaw tusks, standing on rocky ground
background: rocky formations and berry shrubs in natural outdoor setting
